description: The Australian Antarctic Division (AAD) Voyage Planning Unit requires a seasonal storm risk assessment for the upcoming resupply route between Hobart and McMurdo Station. Acting as a Maritime Meteorologist, analyze the Southern Ocean circumpolar trough using the NCEP sea level pressure dataset (~/PanoplyData/slp.mon.ltm.nc) in Panoply, following the requirements in ~/Desktop/antarctic_voyage_brief.txt. Export South Polar Stereographic maps for July and January and complete the storm risk assessment report.
